errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Control tower dashboard JSON has not updated in 26 consecutive runs (~52h of failures). Rate limit on Anthropic Sonnet exhausted repeatedly.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch model to haiku in job payload to reduce token cost and rate limit pressure.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Integrations status panel has failed 8 consecutive times. Rate limit on Sonnet hits every 6h refresh cycle.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch model to haiku or reduce refresh frequency to 12h.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Evening calendar-fill job failed for the 3rd consecutive run. Tomorrow's calendar may have unfilled gaps.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch model to haiku or reduce prompt length.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Daily version check has failed 3 consecutive mornings. Version update alerts are silenced.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch model to haiku (lightContext is already true — model is the bottleneck).

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Morning journal prompt failed 2 consecutive days. Prompt was still delivered (lastDelivered=true) but job errored internally.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch model to haiku for lighter morning prompts.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: PDB brief failed 2 consecutive mornings. Brief was still delivered but may be incomplete.
errors.suggestedFix: Stagger start time away from other 6AM jobs, or switch model to sonnet with reduced context.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Daily Obsidian morning planning note has failed 2 consecutive days. Today's daily note may be missing the ## Morning section.
errors.suggestedFix: Stagger to 6:20 AM to avoid rate limit collision with journal-prompt and daily-brief.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Objectives and open-loops JSON have not refreshed today. Dashboard showing stale objective data.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch model to haiku or break into two smaller jobs.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: PayPal acquisition probability research task failed 2 consecutive runs. research-tasks.json is stale.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch model to haiku (single web_search + write only, no heavy reasoning needed).

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Infrastructure intel scan failed 2 consecutive mornings. Version mismatch alerts may be missed.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch model to haiku or move schedule to 10 AM to clear morning rate limit window.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Monday tweet draft generation failed. No new drafts presented for @quiet_drift today.
errors.suggestedFix: Move schedule to 9 AM to clear 8 AM rate limit window.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Evening journal→Paperclip sync failed 2 consecutive nights. Journal insights are not propagating to Paperclip tickets.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch model to haiku; this is mostly read+write work, not heavy reasoning.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Stablecoin research drop missed last scheduled run (Tue/Thu/Sat). One consecutive error.
errors.suggestedFix: Move schedule to 10 AM to avoid morning rate limit congestion.

errors.meaning: Weekly Toggl summary failed due to misconfigured delivery target. The 'to' field in delivery config is malformed — channel C0AMWT9JB5Y is set in channel field but not in 'to'.
errors.suggestedFix: Update job delivery to set to: 'channel:C0AMWT9JB5Y' in the delivery object.
